sections.markdown:
- 8 km aerobic support run
- Start very controlled, then settle into relaxed aerobic running without forcing a second real workout into the week.
- Keep this clearly below steady effort. At most, include `10 minutes` of light uptempo running in the middle if the legs feel fresh; otherwise keep the whole run easy.
- Thursday's gym stays supportive rather than ambitious, and if Tuesday still lingers the lifting should shrink to mobility and stability only.
